name: UpdateFleetCapacityOutput
description: UpdateFleetCapacityOutput schema from Amazon GameLift API

allOf.description: A unique identifier for the fleet that was updated.

The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that is assigned to a Amazon GameLift fleet resource and uniquely identifies it. ARNs are unique across all Regions. Format is arn:aws:gamelift:<region>::fleet/fleet-a1234567-b8c9-0d1e-2fa3-b45c6d7e8912.
The remote location being updated, expressed as an Amazon Web Services Region code, such as us-west-2.
